node.title: Uber | Software Engineer L4 | Bangalore | Mar 2022 |  Reject

topic.title: Uber | Software Engineer L4 | Bangalore | Mar 2022 |  Reject

post.content: What was your approach for Round 3 question ? design search of application logs ?

Round 2 question can be solved using Graph(or adjacency Matrix) as well. We can modify edge weights to store information. Ex : for (GBP, EUR, 10) in the adjacency Matrix we can store 10 for GBP to EUR and 1/10 for EUR to GBP.  Then it becomes a problem of finding weighted path between given nodes.
How long you have to wait after codesignal assessment?  I have done both the questions with all TC\'s passed. Still haven\'t heard back from recruiter.
Thanks a lot OP. Great work! There was no LLD round? Machine Coding round? I thought Uber usually asks LLD.
Is the exchangeValue correct? Shouldn\'t it be, \ndouble exchangeValue = conversionRate[dest] / conversionRate[src];
